cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Pageviews card shows the empty state when no pageviews have been recorded
cases.preconditions: No pageviews have been recorded for the site (installation code not yet added or no traffic). C134

steps.content: Locate the Pageviews card on the Dashboard.
steps.expected: The Pageviews card should be displayed with the title "Pageviews".

steps.content: Observe the body of the Pageviews card.
steps.expected: An empty-state illustration should be displayed in place of the line chart.

steps.content: Read the empty-state message below the illustration.
steps.expected: The message should read "No pageviews found!" with the sub-text "Pageviews may not have been recorded yet. Make sure you've added the installation code to your site".

steps.content: Confirm the "View all data" link is present at the bottom of the card.
steps.expected: The "View all data" link with arrow should be visible and interactive.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Pageviews card renders the pageviews line chart when pageviews exist
cases.preconditions: Pageviews have been recorded for the site (banner installed and the website visited). C205

steps.content: Locate the Pageviews card on the Dashboard.
steps.expected: The Pageviews card should be displayed with the title "Pageviews".

steps.content: Observe the body of the Pageviews card.
steps.expected: A pageviews line chart should be rendered in place of the empty state.

steps.content: Confirm the "View all data" link is present at the bottom of the card.
steps.expected: The "View all data" link with arrow should be visible and interactive.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Pageviews line chart plots pageview counts over the selected date range with hover details
cases.preconditions: Pageviews have been recorded for the site across one or more days. C205

steps.content: Locate the pageviews line chart in the Pageviews card.
steps.expected: The pageviews line chart should be rendered in the Pageviews card.

steps.content: Inspect the Y axis of the chart.
steps.expected: The Y axis should display the pageview count scale.

steps.content: Inspect the X axis of the chart.
steps.expected: The X axis should display the selected date range / time span.

steps.content: Confirm a data point is plotted when only a single day of pageview data exists.
steps.expected: A pointer/marker should be displayed on the chart for the single-day pageview count.

steps.content: Hover over a plotted point on the line chart.
steps.expected: A tooltip should display the selected date and its corresponding pageview count.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the "View all data" link on the Pageviews card navigates to the website reports page

steps.content: Locate the "View all data" link at the bottom of the Pageviews card.
steps.expected: The "View all data" link with arrow should be visible and interactive.
The website reports page (/website-reports) should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Dashboard Pageviews card chart highlights over-limit usage
cases.preconditions: The user has consumed more than 100% of the website's pageview limit.

steps.content: Navigate to the Dashboard and locate the "Pageviews" card.
steps.expected: The "Pageviews" card should be displayed with a chart reflecting pageviews used.

steps.content: Observe the portion of the chart beyond the plan limit.
steps.expected: The over-limit portion should be highlighted in red, labelled with the exceeded pageview count.
The exact pageview count should be displayed in a tooltip at the hovered point.
